title: Ethiopian Garlic Tagine with Sriracha
description: A garlicky and velvety Ethiopian-inspired dish with a kick of sriracha, perfect for a quick breakfast or lunch.

ingredients.name: Chicken breast
ingredients.notes: Boneless and skinless, cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat oil in a tagine or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced bamboo shoot and sauté for 2-3 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add the chicken breast and sauté for 3-4 minutes, until browned.
Add the sriracha sauce, ghee, salt, black pepper, turmeric powder, and paprika powder.
Mix well and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 15-20 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and adjust seasoning to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with injera bread.
Garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
